name: messaging_automation_platform
description: NestJS backend for a scalable messaging automation platform

scripts.security:check-env: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const allowed=new Set(['.env.example','.env.local.backup']);const ignore=new Set(['node_modules','dist','.git']);const bad=[];function walk(dir){for(const ent of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){if(ent.isDirectory()){if(ignore.has(ent.name)) continue; walk(path.join(dir,ent.name)); continue;} if(!ent.isFile()) continue; const name=ent.name; if(name==='.env'||(name.startsWith('.env.')&&!allowed.has(name))){ if(!allowed.has(name)) bad.push(path.join(dir,name)); } }} walk(root); if(bad.length){console.error('Found forbidden env files (only .env.example is allowed; .env.local.backup is tolerated):'); for(const p of bad) console.error(' - '+path.relative(root,p)); process.exit(1);} console.log('OK: no forbidden .env files found.');"
scripts.security:rotate-secrets: node -e "console.log(['Rotate secrets checklist:','1) JWT_SECRET: generate a new strong random secret (32+ chars).','   - After rotation, all existing JWT sessions/tokens become invalid.','2) META_APP_SECRET: rotate in Meta Developer Dashboard (App Settings > Basic / Webhooks).','   - Update env and verify webhook signature still passes.','3) WHATSAPP_TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY: generate a NEW 32-byte base64 key (AES-256-GCM).','   - IMPORTANT: rotating this requires re-encrypting WhatsappAccount access tokens in the database (or re-enter tokens).','','Suggested commands:','- Generate JWT secret (example): node -e "const c=require(\"crypto\");console.log(c.randomBytes(48).toString(\"base64\"))"','- Generate WhatsApp encryption key (32 bytes): node -e "const c=require(\"crypto\");console.log(c.randomBytes(32).toString(\"base64\"))"','','After updating secrets:','- Restart the backend','- Re-test: /auth/login, WhatsApp webhook verification, outbound sending',''].join('\n'));"
